service.name: Groq API
service.description_for_ai: Ultra-fast AI inference using custom LPU hardware. Llama 3, Mixtral, Gemma at 300-800 tokens/second — fastest available. OpenAI-compatible. Free tier generous. Use when speed matters: real-time chat, voice assistants, interactive apps.

auth.cost: Free tier: 6000 tokens/min. Paid from $0.05/1M tokens

capabilities.description_for_ai: Ultra-fast chat completions — 10-20x faster than OpenAI. Same quality, much faster. Best for real-time interactive applications.

agent_hints.speed: Groq returns 300-800 tok/sec vs 30-60 tok/sec for OpenAI. Use for latency-sensitive apps.
agent_hints.rate_limits: Free tier: 6000 tokens/min, 30 req/min. Higher on paid plans.
